mapper.insert: INSERT INTO incident_log ( report_no, report_date, intake_method_cd, status_cd, site_cd, lat, lng, accuracy_m, captured_at, captured_ts, server_received_at, addr, cell_phone, rpt_img_path, rpt_img_name, process_note, img_path, img_name, img_path2, img_name2, img_path3, img_name3, img_path4, img_name4, manager_id, update_datetime, update_ip, ocr_read_km ) SELECT i.report_no, i.report_date, i.intake_method_cd, i.status_cd, i.site_cd, i.lat, i.lng, i.accuracy_m, i.captured_at, i.captured_ts, i.server_received_at, i.addr, i.cell_phone, i.rpt_img_path, i.rpt_img_name, i.process_note, i.img_path, i.img_name, i.img_path2, i.img_name2, i.img_path3, i.img_name3, i.img_path4, i.img_name4, i.manager_id, i.update_datetime, i.update_ip, i.ocr_read_km FROM incident i WHERE i.report_no = #{reportNo};
mapper.select: /* IncidentLogMapper.selectTimelineByReportNo - 사고 타임라인(상태변경 이력) 조회 */ SELECT IFNULL(a.update_datetime, a.report_date) AS eventDt , b.cd_code_nm AS statusNm , c.user_nm FROM incident_log a LEFT JOIN cd_common b ON a.status_cd = b.cd_code AND b.cd_div = '002' AND b.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN admin_user c ON a.manager_id = c.user_id AND c.use_yn = 1 WHERE a.report_no = #{reportNo}
